productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Ferrari Replica Red Backpacks
description: Everything ferrari touches becomes a thing of understated beauty, and this sleek backpack is no exception. With its durable construction and generous storage, the Ferrari Replica Backpack is a no-brainer for on-the-go convenience and easy style. Prego! Length: 32 cm Made of polyester and synthetic with rugged lining for durability Two-way zip opening into main compartment, padded laptop sleeve and interior/exterior pockets for optimum storage Main chamber for laptop Adjustable shoulder straps and expandable handle on top for comfortable and flexible carrying options Rubber Ferrari Shield and reflective puma cat Logo for instant style Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
